description: CompositionBlack track jacket made of 53% polyester and 47% cotton, with ribbed neck, cuffs and hem, side-zip pockets, embroidered club badge on left chest, swoosh logo on right chest and Brazil print on the centre back in blackFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not use softeners Do not bleach Cool iron Tumble dry on low Do not iron on design Do not dry clean Cheer the only team in history to take five football championships and the only team to play in every world competition with this Brasil CBF track jacket from nike. The insulating jacket is packed with winning attitude. Wear it on the field or team it off the field with jeans and nike shoes for a cook casual look.
